allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('css'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('oracle'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('pm2'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('java'\)\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const di = require\('react-icons/di'\); const keys = Object.keys\(di\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('oracle'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('java'\)\).join\(', '\)\); const bs = require\('react-icons/bs'\); const bskeys = Object.keys\(bs\); console.log\(bskeys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('database'\)\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fa = require\('react-icons/fa'\); const keys = Object.keys\(fa\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('java'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('node'\)\).join\(', '\).slice\(0,200\)\);")
